name: Access Control Policy
text: The organization shall implement multi-factor authentication for all systems handling sensitive information. Access rights shall be reviewed quarterly and documented. User accounts shall be deactivated within 24 hours of employee termination.

name: Information Security Policy
text: Top management shall establish and maintain an information security policy that defines the organization's approach to information security. The policy shall be reviewed annually and communicated to all employees.

name: Risk Management Policy
text: The organization shall conduct regular risk assessments to identify threats and vulnerabilities. Risk treatment plans shall be documented and approved by management. Residual risks shall be accepted or mitigated.
